title: Stage1 projection variant
description: Draft v1.4.0-gated cross-surface identity relation for component mappings. Represents one surface-specific projection of a canonical map/capability.

id.description: Stable identifier for the projection variant.

surface.description: Surface label such as desktop, mobile, modal, or sidebar.

external_component.description: Observed surface-specific component label when it differs from the canonical map name.

capability_id.description: Optional first-class capability entity linked to this surface projection.

selector.description: Representative selector or cluster signature for the surface projection.

confidence.description: Confidence score for the identity-resolution link.

evidence_chain.description: Evidence supporting the cross-surface identity merge.

metadata.description: Open metadata bag reserved for future cross-surface identity details.
